raw_title: Updating Public Value: How Journalists Understand Their Societal Role in the Context of Digital Platforms
title_en: Updating Public Value: How Journalists Understand Their Societal Role in the Context of Digital Platforms
title_zh: 更新公共价值：数字平台背景下记者如何理解其社会角色
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了在数字平台（如社交媒体和新闻网站）日益重要的时代，记者如何重新思考自己的工作对社会有什么价值。研究人员想了解记者们如何看待自己在数字环境中的角色，以及他们如何适应新的工作方式。
plain_summary_en: This study explores how journalists are rethinking the value of their work to society in an era where digital platforms (like social media and news websites) are increasingly important. Researchers want to understand how journalists view their roles in digital environments and how they adapt to new ways of working.
research_direction_zh: 新闻职业认同与数字媒体转型研究
research_direction_en: Research on journalistic professional identity and digital media transformation
